name: actit-pass-storage
description: Локальный менеджер секретов с зашифрованными базами

scripts.docker:test: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 docker-compose build test && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm test
scripts.docker:apk: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 docker-compose build build-apk && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm build-apk
scripts.docker:apk:fast: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm --no-deps build-apk
scripts.docker:apk:release: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 docker-compose build build-apk && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm -e BUILD_MODE=release build-apk
scripts.docker:deb: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 docker-compose build build-deb && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm build-deb
scripts.docker:deb:fast: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm --no-deps build-deb
scripts.docker:release: mkdir -p dist && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 docker-compose build build-apk build-deb && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm -e BUILD_MODE=release build-apk && COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT=300 HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker-compose run --rm build-deb
